mapper.select: SELECT seat_id, event_id, seat_identifier, status, price, locked_until, locked_by_order FROM seat WHERE event_id = #{eventId} AND status = 'AVAILABLE' ORDER BY seat_identifier
SELECT seat_id, event_id, seat_identifier, status, price, locked_until, locked_by_order FROM seat WHERE event_id = #{eventId} ORDER BY seat_identifier
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO seat (seat_id, event_id, seat_identifier, status, price, locked_until, locked_by_order) VALUES (#{seatId}, #{eventId}, #{seatIdentifier}, #{status}, #{price}, #{lockedUntil}, #{lockedByOrder})
